goal: Recertify the current final-release blocker state after the M6 verification resume closeout. Refresh real-adapter candidate scan and CUDA training host preflight evidence, record the exact remaining external prerequisites in WORKING.md, and keep the release decision NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.
head: a33eaae
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may refresh current NOT_GO release-blocker evidence artifacts and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Real-adapter candidate scan remains NO_GO_CANDIDATES_FOUND with go_candidate_count 0

CUDA training preflight remains NOT_READY_CUDA_LORA_TRAINING with Docker daemon available and blockers limited to missing digest-pinned CUDA/Python base image, missing nvidia-smi/CUDA visibility, and base image availability
v0 readiness remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
WORKING.md records the refreshed blocker facts without claiming M6-RC or v0 GO
warnings: M6-RC and v0 remain NOT_GO until real trained CUDA adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exists.
This gate does not edit release review docs or product code.

phase_notes.plan: Refresh current release-blocker evidence after the M6 verification resume closeout.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed current v0 readiness is NOT_GO, candidate scan has no GO real adapter, and local host lacks nvidia-smi/CUDA; Docker daemon is available only when preflight runs outside the sandbox.
phase_notes.build: Refresh candidate scan and CUDA preflight artifacts, then update WORKING.md with exact remaining external prerequisites.
phase_notes.check: Candidate scan remains NO_GO_CANDIDATES_FOUND with go_candidate_count 0; CUDA preflight remains expected NOT_READY with Docker daemon available and blockers docker_base_image_env_digest, cuda_visible, and docker_base_image_available; v0 readiness remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker.
phase_notes.done: Phase verified. Stage, commit, and push are approved by the user phase policy; release readiness remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.

pabcd.approved_scope: Refresh current NOT_GO release-blocker evidence artifacts, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product code changes, no verifier policy changes, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
